title: Improve OpenAI Retry-After handling
goal: Improve OpenAI provider rate-limit handling by parsing Retry-After more completely and classifying rate-limit messages as retryable.
completionConditions: OpenAI Retry-After parser accepts both delay-seconds and HTTP-date values.
OpenAI retry classifier explicitly treats 429/rate limit/too many requests as retryable.
Rate limit error text preserves retry-after seconds when available.
Focused tests and cargo check pass.
selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: First implementation slice from issue #27. No new dependencies unless already available; prefer small helpers in OpenAI runtime with unit tests.
